disclaimer: Risk assessment log entries are operational provenance records — a risk assessment event does not modify candidate scores or pathway routing, does not authorize external submission, and does not constitute a detection claim.

entries.notes: Potential unauthorized access vector identified in network configuration; logged for assessment.
Single-point-of-failure risk assessed for primary data processing node; mitigation plan drafted.
Data retention policy updated to comply with institutional requirements; risk closed.
Minor vibration risk in antenna mount accepted as within operational tolerance; monitoring continued.
Overheating risk mitigated by installation of redundant cooling unit; temperature now nominal.
